queries.question: List the eligibility criteria and documentation requirements demanded for the largest loan.
queries.sql:
SELECT Eligibility_Criteria.criteria, Eligibility_Criteria.score, Documentation_Requirements.doc_type, Documentation_Requirements.requirement  FROM Eligibility_Criteria JOIN Loans ON Loans.eligibility_criteria_id = Eligibility_Criteria.id JOIN Documentation_Requirements ON Loans.Documentation_Requirement_id = Documentation_Requirements.id  WHERE
amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM Loans)
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?criteria ?score ?doc_type ?requirement WHERE {
  ?eligibility_criteria a :Eligibility_Criteria .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasEligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?documentation_requirements a :Documentation_Requirements .
  ?loans p:hasDocumentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:criteria ?criteria .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:score ?score .
  ?documentation_requirements p:doc_type ?doc_type .
  ?documentation_requirements p:requirement ?requirement .
  ?loans p:amount ?amount_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:amount ?m0 } }
  FILTER(xsd:double(?amount_x) = xsd:double(?m))
}

queries.question: What was the eligibility criteria and documentation requirements for the company with the fewest employees?
queries.sql: SELECT Eligibility_Criteria.criteria, Eligibility_Criteria.score, Documentation_Requirements.doc_type, Documentation_Requirements.requirement  FROM Eligibility_Criteria JOIN Loans ON Loans.eligibility_criteria_id = Eligibility_Criteria.id JOIN Business_Loan_Applications ON Business_Loan_Applications.loan_id = Loans.id JOIN Documentation_Requirements ON Loans.Documentation_Requirement_id = Documentation_Requirements.id  ORDER BY num_employees ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?criteria ?score ?doc_type ?requirement WHERE {
  ?eligibility_criteria a :Eligibility_Criteria .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasEligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?business_loan_applications a :Business_Loan_Applications .
  ?business_loan_applications p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?documentation_requirements a :Documentation_Requirements .
  ?loans p:hasDocumentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:criteria ?criteria .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:score ?score .
  ?documentation_requirements p:doc_type ?doc_type .
  ?documentation_requirements p:requirement ?requirement .
  ?business_loan_applications p:num_employees ?num_employees_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?num_employees_o)
LIMIT 1

amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM Loans)

amount = (SELECT MAX(amount) FROM Loans)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What were the requirements for obtaining the largest loan
What were the loan requirements for the company with the fewest employees?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?criteria ?score ?doc_type ?requirement WHERE {
  ?eligibility_criteria a :Eligibility_Criteria .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasEligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?business_loan_applications a :Business_Loan_Applications .
  ?business_loan_applications p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?documentation_requirements a :Documentation_Requirements .
  ?loans p:hasDocumentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:criteria ?criteria .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:score ?score .
  ?documentation_requirements p:doc_type ?doc_type .
  ?documentation_requirements p:requirement ?requirement .
  ?business_loan_applications p:num_employees ?num_employees_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?num_employees_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component: { SELECT ?doc_type ?requirement WHERE {
  ?documentation_requirements a :Documentation_Requirements .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasDocumentation_Requirements ?documentation_requirements .
  ?business_loan_applications a :Business_Loan_Applications .
  ?business_loan_applications p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?documentation_requirements p:doc_type ?doc_type .
  ?documentation_requirements p:requirement ?requirement .
  ?business_loan_applications p:num_employees ?num_employees_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?num_employees_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?criteria ?score WHERE {
  ?eligibility_criteria a :Eligibility_Criteria .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?loans p:hasEligibility_Criteria ?eligibility_criteria .
  ?business_loan_applications a :Business_Loan_Applications .
  ?business_loan_applications p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:criteria ?criteria .
  ?eligibility_criteria p:score ?score .
  ?business_loan_applications p:num_employees ?num_employees_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?num_employees_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
